step_rationale: Cleaved GPIbα ectodomain; released upon platelet activation.
mechanism: Glycocalicin is the soluble ectodomain of platelet GPIbα shed during platelet activation, reflecting vWF-mediated platelet tethering and adhesion to injured endothelium.

references.title: Biomarkers of in vivo platelet activation in coronary artery disease: a systematic review and meta-analysis: communication from the SSC of the ISTH.
references.journal: Journal of thrombosis and haemostasis : JTH

references.title: A reliable plasma marker of platelet activation: does it exist?
